title: Orbital Wolf Cannon
description: Summon 48 powerful wolves in a perfect circle around you and unleash chaos on your enemies.
body:
# 🐺 Orbital Wolf Cannon

Unleash absolute chaos with a single right-click.

**Orbital Wolf Cannon** introduces a powerful new item — the **Orbital Wolf Rod** — that allows you to instantly summon a full pack of loyal wolves in a perfect circle around you. Whether you're overwhelmed by mobs or just want to dominate the battlefield, this mod turns you into the alpha.

---

## ⚡ What Does It Do?

Using the Orbital Wolf Rod will:

- 🐺 Summon **48 wolves** in a perfect circular formation around you  
- 🛡️ Equip every wolf with **wolf armor**  
- 💪 Apply **Strength II for 5 minutes** to all wolves  
- 🎯 Automatically target and attack nearby hostile mobs  
- 🔵 Create a **cinematic particle ring effect**  
- 🔊 Play a powerful activation sound  
- ⏳ Apply a **cooldown** to prevent spam  

The result? A devastating wolf strike that instantly shifts combat in your favor.

---

## ⚙️ Fully Customizable

A config file is automatically generated, giving you full control over the mod’s behavior:

You can customize:
- 🔢 Number of wolves
- 📏 Spawn radius
- ⏱️ Cooldown duration
- 💪 Strength effect duration & level
- 🐺 Wolf despawn time
- 🎨 Particle effects (on/off)
- 🔊 Sound effects (on/off)

📂 Config location:
.minecraft/config/orbital_wolf_cannon.json


---

## 🎮 Perfect For

- ⚔️ Combat-focused gameplay
- 🧟 Fighting large groups of mobs
- 🎥 Content creation & showcases
- 😈 Just having fun with overpowered abilities

---

## 🌐 Multiplayer Ready

- Works perfectly in multiplayer
- Wolves are correctly owned by the player who summons them

---

## 🔧 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

## 🚀 Why You'll Love It

Unlike typical summoning mods, **Orbital Wolf Cannon** focuses on:
- Clean, satisfying **circular formations**
- Instant impact gameplay
- Highly customizable mechanics
- Visually impressive effects

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

This mod is intentionally powerful and may feel overpowered in survival — use the config to balance it to your liking.

---

## 📢 Feedback & Support

Have ideas or found a bug?  
Feel free to share feedback and help improve the mod!

---

🔥 Become the alpha. Command your pack. Dominate everything.

---
